channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Obama Center visitors see project as symbol of 'Black excellence' and praise scandal-free legacy while criticizing Trump
item.description: Visitors at the opening of the Barack Obama Presidential Center celebrated his legacy as a model of Black excellence and lamented political divisions under President Trump.

item.title: Trump's energy policy keeps oil under $80 despite Iran tensions
Sen. Graham predicts Iran MOU will collapse, US to seize Hormuz
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, R-S.C., predicted Sunday that the U.S.-Iran framework agreement signed last week will collapse, adding that President Trump is prepared to seize control of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Corbett-Dillon to Newsmax: Trump may push UK's Starmer to resign
item.description: British political strategist Thomas Corbett-Dillon told Newsmax on Sunday that British Prime Minister Keir Starmer appears determined to stay in office, but Trump could be giving him a nudge to quit.
